list.name: Changes
list.comment:
Add Notes/User Drawing layer support, session auto-save, and result filtering
- Added option to include Notes/User Drawing layer in rendering and UI - Implemented auto-save and restore of session state and results JSON - Enhanced polarity marker visuals for improved clarity - Added search/filter box for results table - Updated layer detection and rendering logic to support new features

task.summary:
Enhance component detection and add polarity correction dialog
- Updated component detection patterns to include additional types (regulators, converters, etc.). - Introduced a new dialog for manually correcting component polarity markings. - Improved handling of ODB++ netlist parsing to resolve cathode pins for diodes and LEDs. - Added functionality for saving and loading manual corrections from a sidecar JSON file.

Enhance component detection and add polarity correction dialog
- Updated component detection patterns to include additional types (regulators, converters, etc.). - Introduced a new dialog for manually correcting component polarity markings. - Improved handling of ODB++ netlist parsing to resolve cathode pins for diodes and LEDs. - Added functionality for saving and loading manual corrections from a sidecar JSON file.

Add Notes/User Drawing layer support, session auto-save, and result filtering
- Added option to include Notes/User Drawing layer in rendering and UI - Implemented auto-save and restore of session state and results JSON - Enhanced polarity marker visuals for improved clarity - Added search/filter box for results table - Updated layer detection and rendering logic to support new features

MESSAGE.value:
Enhance component detection and add polarity correction dialog
- Updated component detection patterns to include additional types (regulators, converters, etc.). - Introduced a new dialog for manually correcting component polarity markings. - Improved handling of ODB++ netlist parsing to resolve cathode pins for diodes and LEDs. - Added functionality for saving and loading manual corrections from a sidecar JSON file.

Add Notes/User Drawing layer support, session auto-save, and result filtering
- Added option to include Notes/User Drawing layer in rendering and UI - Implemented auto-save and restore of session state and results JSON - Enhanced polarity marker visuals for improved clarity - Added search/filter box for results table - Updated layer detection and rendering logic to support new features

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
Add Notes/User Drawing layer support, session auto-save, and result filtering
- Added option to include Notes/User Drawing layer in rendering and UI - Implemented auto-save and restore of session state and results JSON - Enhanced polarity marker visuals for improved clarity - Added search/filter box for results table - Updated layer detection and rendering logic to support new features
